chosen: GoHighLevel's July 2026 'User Replied' workflow trigger stops automated follow-up from double-texting a lead once a team member replies manually
rejected: Instagram's 2026 algorithm shift toward DM shares/sends-per-reach as the top ranking signal (weaker tie to revenue systems, more about content growth than lead follow-up)
Google Business Profile messaging auto-disable and response-time ranking factor (duplicates a previously shipped post's core mechanism)
Google's July 6, 2026 Local Services Ads policy rename to 'requirements' (mostly administrative wording change, thin actionable value, LSA news already covered twice)

chosen: HubSpot research on consumer 'immediate response' expectations (82% / 10-minute definition) applied to service-business speed-to-lead
rejected: Salesforce 64% real-time-response expectation stat (redundant with HubSpot angle, less specific)
Buffer/Socialinsider DM-shares algorithm weighting (platform news, not market research)
Multi-channel response combo lifting conversion 45% (weaker single-source attribution)
